_provenance.note: declarationDatesLast=6 was passed but the API returned the FULL declaration history back to FY2008. Kept in full — it is the highest-value PIT artifact.

_golden_master.backs: M0 PIT-leak detector + the bitemporal knowledge_date convention. For a fundamental of period P, knowledge_date = its declarationDate. A read as_of=D must NOT return a period whose declarationDate > D.
_golden_master.worked_example: Period 202503 (Q1 2025) was declared 2025-04-30. A backtest as_of 2025-04-15 must see period 202412 (declared 2025-02-18) as the latest known KCHOL fundamental, NOT 202503. This single mapping is the make-or-break for an honest backtest.
_golden_master.coverage: Declaration dates available back to FY2008 (period 200812 declared 2009-03-11) — matches the data-sourcing finding of publication dates from 2009.

data._note: Annual (12) periods listed in full back to 2008; intra-year quarters present back to ~2009 in the source. Full set re-fetchable.
